gallery.next_action: inspect and remediate the six M1.b, one Cnt.d, and one Cnt.e geometries
gallery.scope: do not treat the gallery fixture as DRC-clean

inverter.next_action: advance to the next engineering workflow stage with limitations attached
inverter.scope: continue the inverter workflow; this is not tapeout signoff

limitations.impact: The executable Ruby deck may read transitive inputs; the reviewed main deck, declared provenance inputs, and optional waiver database boundary are hashed, but undeclared transitive reads are not enumerated.
KLayout stdout and stderr are retained as bounded tails, not unbounded logs.
The executable Netgen setup Tcl may read transitive files or ambient environment state that the operation cannot infer.
The Netgen decision requires complete streams within the capture bound; the retained transcript is not an unbounded native log.
LVS compares the pinned pre-extracted layout netlist with the pinned schematic netlist; this chain does not extract an LVS netlist from GDS.
This open-source reference flow supports an engineering proceed/block decision; it is not foundry tapeout signoff.
The gallery DRC failure is a separate real design fixture and does not change the clean inverter's proceed decision.
The replay records the OpenADA checkout before and after execution; a dirty or changing checkout makes publication provisional until a source freeze.

ieee_measurement_standard.reason: These assertions classify foundry-deck geometry and structural netlist equivalence; they are not signal measurements such as SNR.
